cases.prompt: review the architecture of this plan before I start coding

assertions.text: Locks in the execution plan covering architecture, data flow, diagrams, edge cases, test coverage, and performance
Walks through issues interactively with opinionated recommendations
Catches architecture issues before implementation begins
Surfaces edge cases and test coverage gaps as part of locking the plan
Examines data flow and produces or requests diagrams for the architecture

cases.prompt: technical review of the plan, eng manager mode

assertions.text: Treats this as the eng plan review trigger and runs the interactive eng-manager review
Considers performance implications (e.g. N+1 / latency) when reviewing the architecture
